title: opus-harness project config
description: Consumer contract: JSON Schema defaults are NOT auto-applied. /calibrate must write a COMPLETE config (all optional fields with their default values). Hook scripts must still null-coalesce when reading (e.g. missing voting.ratchetLimit -> 2).

testQuick.description: Fast scoped test run. If absent, stop-gate hook falls back to commands.test; if both absent, hook warns and fail-opens.

protectedBranches.description: Release branches only a HUMAN may merge into; /calibrate anchors this list (non-empty, must include the repo's release/default branch). The default branch is ALWAYS implicitly protected; agents may EXTEND the protected set but never shrink it, and manipulating its inputs (remote set-head, re-pointing/removing remotes, deleting or renaming main/master) counts as shrinking (constraints.md: human-merge-gate). Effective protected set = this list UNION existing main/master UNION resolvable origin/HEAD; if the git section is missing or the set is undeterminable, treat as the full conservative set.

integrationBranch.description: Explicit override for where stage merges land. MUST NOT be a protected branch -- checked at cycle start and before every stage merge; on conflict treat as unset, decide-and-log, notify without pausing. Empty = derive from the cycle's starting branch (protected start -> short-lived feature branch + final PR; non-protected start -> that branch is the integration branch).

panelSize.description: Reserved, not consumed yet: panel composition follows review.dimensions (one reviewer per dimension).
